I understand that you're running a pressure washing business in Orlando and struggling to get traction with your marketing efforts, specifically on Facebook. You've been posting, but it feels like you're not getting anywhere, and you're frustrated because you know your work is good. To address this, I think it would be helpful to implement a more streamlined approach to your marketing. One potential solution could be to utilize a platform that allows you to access and manage multiple marketing tools and models in one place, similar to a unified API gateway.
